statement.en: Qualitative insight into uronylated human milk oligosaccharides and mucin derived non-invasively from the neonatal gut
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is observation-impossible in its current state. The abstract is embargoed and unavailable; the full content cannot be evaluated. This is a metadata stub without substantive content to assess. The claimed date (2026-04-25) is in the future relative to knowledge cutoff, suggesting either an error or a placeholder.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 母乳から腸へ流れる糖鎖が、粘膜という時間領域で新生児のシグネチャを刻む。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 母乳の甘い粒子たちが下降し、腸という受け皿で共鳴する—生命の最初の対話。
